CustomField.description: When non-null, allows admin users inside the org to sign DocumentAction__c slots on behalf of others (e.g., for demo prep). Off by default because admin-on-behalf signing is legally questionable for real signing — use the public portal flow for real signers.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set to a date/time to enable admin-side signing in the embedded document viewer. Leave blank to require all signing through the public portal.
CustomField.label: Enable Admin Signing
